title: BookHold
description: A hold / reservation a patron places on a Brooklyn Public Library catalog item, to be picked up at a chosen branch — the everyday library transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO documented public API and NO Open Data twin for holds; today a patron places and tracks a hold only inside the BiblioCommons catalog (bklynlibrary.bibliocommons.com), behind a login. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a patron's own holds) and the BookHoldRequest write surface (place a hold).

holdId.description: Server-assigned hold id. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Hold lifecycle status. Set by BPL/BiblioCommons, not the patron.

cardNumber.description: Patron card number placing the hold (from the authenticated session).

notifyBy.description: How the patron wants to be notified when the hold is ready.

suspendUntil.description: Optionally freeze the hold until this date.
